title: Heavenly Dreams Data Layer
description: Unified executive data layer contract. Each platform keeps its operational database; the data layer consumes events, snapshots or controlled APIs only.

rules.noDirectJoins: Direct joins between productive databases are forbidden without an approved policy.
rules.noCrossDbAccess: No platform reads another platform's database directly.
rules.noPii: Aggregated snapshots must never contain full PII, only identifiers and aggregations.
rules.financeApproval: Financial snapshots require HD-ADMIN approval before exposure.
rules.producerQuality: Each producer platform is responsible for the validity of its snapshots.
